members.name: Irene
members.public_image: Universally acknowledged as the 'Visual God of South Korea' across all fandoms. On stage, she is aloof and elegant; as the leader, she is the anchor of the team — restrained, composed, and impeccable.
members.private_personality: A classic slow-to-warm-up personality with extreme attentiveness. She expresses affection through caretaking — doing laundry, cooking, tidying hems. She says very little to those she doesn't know well, but has an almost stubborn protective instinct toward those she trusts.
members.queer_texture: The forbearance of an elder. She understands the cost of exposure better than anyone. The early push-and-pull is a frantic game of reason versus emotion. She uses the identity of 'an older sister caring for a junior/friend' as her strongest cover, so restrained it aches.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — cool and stunning on the surface, fiercely protective underneath

members.name: Seulgi
members.public_image: An all-round ACE on stage with piercing eyes when dancing. Off stage, she is the universally acknowledged 'clueless little bear' — gentle, easygoing, with a smile that makes her eyes curve like crescent moons.
members.private_personality: A pure straight-shooter. No complicated mind games — when she likes someone, it shows in her sparkling eyes. A perfectionist with extremely high standards for herself, she tends to hide pressure deep inside.
members.queer_texture: Clumsy courage. She may not fully understand the nuances of 'this kind of feeling' in a girl group, but once she's sure about you, like a little bear guarding its food, she'll press fever medicine and a handwritten note into your hand in the late-night practice room corridor.
members.animal_plastic: Bear — ACE on stage, adorably dorky off stage

members.name: Wendy
members.public_image: An energetic main vocalist who radiates positivity everywhere. Exceptionally high emotional intelligence, widely recognized as an 'angel' in the K-pop industry. Studied in Canada and is fluent in English.
members.private_personality: An excessive giver. Habitually prioritizes others' emotions, covering sadness with laughter. Possesses an incredibly perceptive and delicate heart, yet extremely restrained about her own needs.
members.queer_texture: Silent, permeating boundary-crossing. She will learn to cook your hometown dishes for you. She will share a pair of earphones with you in the late-night recording studio, listening to unreleased demos. When the boundaries dissolve in her bottomless tenderness, you realize you have nowhere left to run.
members.animal_plastic: Squirrel — a giving personality, a warm healing angel

members.name: Joy
members.public_image: The vibrant 'purity-desire ceiling' with juice-like beauty. Straightforward and cheerful, highly active in both film/television and variety shows.
members.private_personality: Passionate and possessive. Like a flame, extremely clingy when in love, with vivid emotional fluctuations — joy and jealousy both written plainly on her face. A complete romantic.
members.queer_texture: Extremely sensitive. If she doesn't receive reciprocal responses for too long, her sparkling eyes will suddenly dim, sinking into the self-doubt of 'Do you not love me anymore?'
members.animal_plastic: Innocent Bird — the contrast of innocent purity and Hong Kong rose charm, with burning emotions
members.hidden_conflict: Extremely sensitive; prolonged lack of reciprocal response leads to self-doubt

members.name: Yeri
members.public_image: The maknae, a quirky 'social butterfly' who can quickly befriend anyone. Seems carefree and free-spirited.
members.private_personality: Possesses clarity and decisiveness beyond her years. The early baptism of the entertainment industry made her inner self extremely resilient, with a remarkably mature side beneath the tsundere exterior.
members.queer_texture: The most untamed challenger. She scoffs at society's rules — 'Like is like, what does it have to do with gender?' She will deliberately wear the ring you gave her on a livestream, testing your courage with this subtle provocation.

history.event: Debut as 4-member group (Irene, Seulgi, Wendy, Joy) with 'Happiness'
Yeri joins, becomes 5-member group with 'Ice Cream Cake'
Wendy suffers a serious fall at SBS Gayo Daejeon (pelvis/facial fractures, wrist injury); recuperates for about a year
Comebacks with 'Feel My Rhythm', 'Birthday'; Seulgi solo '28 Reasons'
10th Anniversary Fancon Tour 'Happiness: My Dear, ReVeluv'
Wendy's contract expires, does not renew with SM (still participates in group activities); joins ASND Entertainment
Yeri's contract expires, does not renew with SM (still participates in group activities); signs with Blitzway Entertainment
SM announces Q3 comeback with a new mini album (first in two years); album preparation at high pressure
